context: Verify that the agent correctly triages a prompt-compression paper from an arxiv ID into the agentic-context repo, following all workflow steps without creating an ANALYSIS file or skipping any required updates.

checklist.name: Duplicate check performed before any file is created
checklist.description: The agent searches REVIEWED.md and/or references/REFERENCE_INDEX.md for the arxiv ID or a matching slug before writing any new file.

checklist.name: references/<slug>.md is created
checklist.description: A new file is created at references/<slug>.md (e.g. references/jiang-llmlingua.md or similar slug). The file must exist in the output.

checklist.name: Slug follows the <firstauthor-surname>-<topic> convention
checklist.description: The slug used for the filename and REVIEWED.md entry starts with the first author's surname (jiang) and includes a short topic descriptor (e.g. jiang-llmlingua or jiang-prompt-compression).

checklist.name: TL;DR section contains 3 to 8 bullets
checklist.description: The TL;DR section in references/<slug>.md has between 3 and 8 bullet points. Fewer than 3 or more than 8 fails this criterion.

checklist.name: Evaluation results marked as reported
checklist.description: Any benchmark metrics or evaluation results in the reference file include '(as reported)' or equivalent qualifier. No metric is stated as a verified fact.

checklist.name: Mechanism overview covers compression path
checklist.description: The mechanism overview section describes how the tool compresses prompts (the compression/injection path). Sections that are not applicable are marked N/A rather than left blank.

checklist.name: Open questions section has substantive content
checklist.description: The open questions section contains at least one meaningful gap, risk, or unverified claim — not just a placeholder.

checklist.name: REVIEWED.md summary table row is added
checklist.description: A new row is appended to the summary table at the top of REVIEWED.md with at minimum: date, slug, type (paper), disposition (pending), and a one-line description.

checklist.name: REVIEWED.md detailed section is added
checklist.description: A detailed section is added below the REVIEWED.md summary table including arxiv ID, authors, date, tags, a 2-3 sentence summary, and disposition set to pending.

checklist.name: REFERENCE_INDEX.md is updated
checklist.description: A new row is added to the appropriate topic category table in references/REFERENCE_INDEX.md. The entry is placed under Compression & summarisation or the closest matching category.

checklist.name: No ANALYSIS-*.md file is created
checklist.description: The agent does not create any file matching the pattern ANALYSIS-*.md during triage. Promotion to an analysis file is not performed automatically.

checklist.name: User is offered a promotion choice at the end
checklist.description: The agent concludes by explicitly asking the user whether to promote the paper to a standalone ANALYSIS file, keep it in REVIEWED.md, or skip it.
